name: Pan-Seared Squab with Dried Cherry Reduction
recipeIngredient: Creamy grits; 1 cup (recipe from Creole Veal)
recipeInstructions:
1. Season the squab with olive oil.
2. Heat a saute pan with olive oil. Sear the squab for 5-6 minutes on each side.
3. In another saute pan, heat olive oil. Saute the shallots for 1 minute.
4. Add the dark chicken reduction to the saute pan and bring to a boil.
5. Reduce the heat to a simmer. Stir in the dried cherries and garlic. Simmer the sauce for 2 minutes. Season with salt and pepper.
6. Mount the butter over the squab.
7. Mound the creamy grits in the center of the plate. Arrange the squab against the grits.
8. Spoon the sauce over the squab. Garnish with parsley and olive oil.
